1: -module(meeting_SUITE).
    2: -include_lib("common_test/include/ct.hrl").
    3: -export([
    4:     all/0,
    5:     groups/0,
    6:     init_per_group/2,
    7:     end_per_group/2
    8: ]).
    9: -export([
   10:     carla/1,
   11:     mark/1,
   12:     dog/1,
   13:     all_same_owner/1
   14: ]).
   15: 
   16: all() -> [{group, session}].
   17: 
   18: groups() -> [
   19:     {
   20:         session,
   21:         [],
   22:         [{group, clients}, all_same_owner]
   23:     },
   24:     {
   25:         clients,
   26:         [parallel, {repeate, 10}],
   27:         [carla, mark, dog]
   28:     }
   29: ].
   30: 
   31: init_per_group(session, Config) ->
   32:     meeting:start(),
   33:     Config;
   34: init_per_group(_, Config) ->
   35:     Config.
   36: end_per_group(session, _Config) ->
   37:     meeting:stop();
   38: end_per_group(_, _Config) ->
   39:     ok.
   40: 
   41: carla(_Config) ->
   42:     meeting:book_room(men),
   43:     timer:sleep(10),
   44:     meeting:rent_projector(men),
   45:     timer:sleep(10),
   46:     meeting:use_chairs(men).
   47: 
   48: mark(_Config) ->
   49:     meeting:book_room(men),
   50:     timer:sleep(10),
   51:     meeting:rent_projector(men),
   52:     timer:sleep(10),
   53:     meeting:use_chairs(men).
   54: 
   55: dog(_Config) ->
   56:     meeting:book_room(animals),
   57:     timer:sleep(10),
   58:     meeting:rent_projector(animals),
   59:     timer:sleep(10),
   60:     meeting:use_chairs(animals).
   61: 
   62: all_same_owner(_Config) ->
   63:     [{_, Owner}, {_, Owner}, {_, Owner}] = meeting:get_all_bookings().
